articles.author: Sam Meredith
articles.title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates - CNBC
articles.description: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.
articles.content: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes from U.S. forces over the weekend by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states, deepening a standoff over the strategically vital… [+3724 chars]
